meaning: adj.发霉的,有霉味的,冷淡的
examples: Opening the door, she made a face at the musty smell.
On this day, after a downpour, it smells musty.
It does smell rather musty. Can my mechanic check it out?
The entrance however leads to an Aladdin-like marketplace of high-end Africana craft stores, art galleries and musty bookstores.
The elaborate choice of visual worlds has no doubt helped dismantle musty styles and stereotypes.
